//1: CONFIG-DRIVEN VIRTUAL MATTER DEVICES for the Google-Home → agent-bridge bridge.
//2: Each entry becomes ONE virtual Matter device that shows up in the Google Home
//3: app after commissioning. Saying 'Hey Google, turn on <name>' (or 'set <name> to
//4: 40%') flips that device's OnOff / LevelControl cluster, which fires a handler
//5: that injects a message into the local machine's running Claude Code session.
//6: EDIT THIS FILE to tune the trigger names + the prompts they inject. Restart the
//7: Matter server after editing (LaunchAgent: `launchctl kickstart -k ...`). NOTE:
//8: changing `name` or adding/removing devices changes the Matter node shape — Google
//9: Home may need a re-sync (it usually picks up renames automatically; a brand new
//10: device entry just appears as a new sub-device on the same bridge).
//target: agent-bridge target the injected messages are delivered to on THIS machine. 'claude-code/default' = the default Claude Code persona's inbox (inbox/claude-code/default/). Change only if you run a non-default persona on the Mini.
//ttlSeconds: TTL on each injected agent-bridge message. 86400 = 1 day; the watcher consumes it within ~2s anyway, so this is just a safety expiry.
//fabricLabel: Human-readable label Google shows for the Matter fabric/bridge.

devices.name: Claude
devices.//name: Spoken trigger name. 'Hey Google, turn on Claude'.
devices.//dimmable: true = expose a LevelControl (dimmer) cluster so brightness 0-100% becomes an argument. false = plain on/off switch.
devices.onTemplate: [google-home] trigger=Claude state=on brightness={brightnessPct}. Brightness preset: {preset}. Interpret as a voice command routed from the Nest speaker. Preset 'A' (1-33%) = give me a current fleet status report. Preset 'B' (34-66%) = summarize what's currently running across my subagents. Preset 'C' (67-100%) = full deep status: fleet + subagents + any blockers needing my input. Act on the preset matching brightness {brightnessPct}%.
devices.//onTemplate: Prompt injected when the device is turned ON (or its level is set while on). Placeholders below are substituted at fire time.
devices.offTemplate: [google-home] trigger=Claude state=off. Interpret as a voice command routed from the Nest speaker = stand down / pause the current Claude preset task.
devices.//offTemplate: Prompt injected when the device is turned OFF. Omit to inject nothing on off.

presets.//: Optional brightness→label map. Used to fill the {preset} placeholder. Ranges are inclusive percentages. First matching range wins.

devices.name: Backup
devices.onTemplate: [google-home] trigger=Backup state=on. Interpret as a voice command routed from the Nest speaker = kick off the Engineering Dopamine → Google Drive backup now.

devices.name: Standup
devices.onTemplate: [google-home] trigger=Standup state=on. Interpret as a voice command routed from the Nest speaker = post a short daily status summary to my Telegram.

//placeholders: Template placeholders available in onTemplate/offTemplate: {name} = device name, {state} = on|off, {brightness} = raw Matter level 0-254, {brightnessPct} = 0-100, {preset} = matched preset label (or '' if none/not dimmable).
